code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < tokens.len()
    match tokens.get(i)
    when Some(token)
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(n)
        result = list.push(result, n)
      when None
        # skip non-integer tokens
      end
    when None
      # unreachable
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn find_min(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Option<Int>
  if xs.len() == 0
    None
  else
    mut min_val = 0
    match xs.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      min_val = v
    when None
      # unreachable
    end
    mut i = 1
    while i < xs.len()
      match xs.get(i)
      when Some(v)
        if v < min_val
          min_val = v
        end
      when None
        # unreachable
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    Some(min_val)
  end
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  while i < xs.len()
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      # unreachable
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn sort_ints(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut remaining = xs
  mut sorted: List<Int> = []
  while remaining.len() > 0
    match find_min(remaining)
    when Some(min_val)
      sorted = list.push(sorted, min_val)
      remaining = remove_first(remaining, min_val)
    when None
      remaining = []
    end
  end
  sorted
end

fn main() -> Unit
  mut line1 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line1 = s
  when None
    # EOF, use empty string
  end

  mut line2 = ""
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    line2 = s
  when None
    # EOF, use empty string
  end

  let nums1 = parse_ints(line1)
  let nums2 = parse_ints(line2)

  mut intersection: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  while i < nums1.len()
    match nums1.get(i)
    when Some(n)
      if list.contains(nums2, n) and not list.contains(intersection, n)
        intersection = list.push(intersection, n)
      end
    when None
      # unreachable
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  let sorted = sort_ints(intersection)

  if sorted.len() == 0
    println("empty")
  else
    mut output = ""
    mut j = 0
    while j < sorted.len()
      match sorted.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          output = "#{v}"
        else
          output = "#{output} #{v}"
        end
      when None
        # unreachable
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    println(output)
  end
end
